title: Modular Kitchens
description: Custom modular kitchens for every layout — L-shaped, U-shaped, straight, and island. Built with quality shutters, handles, and loft units tailored to Indore homes.

title: TV Units
description: Wall-mounted and floor-standing TV units, entertainment walls, and display shelving — built to complement any living room style and space.

title: Wardrobes & Bedroom
description: Floor-to-ceiling sliding wardrobes, hinged wardrobes, dressing tables, and complete bedroom sets — built to fit your space precisely.

title: Living Room
description: Custom sofas, coffee tables, display units, crockery cabinets, and shelving — everything your living room needs, handcrafted to last.

title: Office Furniture
description: Custom workstations, reception counters, conference tables, and storage solutions for offices and commercial spaces across Indore.

title: Repairs & Restoration
description: Furniture polishing, veneer repair, hinge and hardware replacement, and complete restoration — bringing old furniture back to life.
